steps.title: Apply the no-solution condition
steps.content: Rewrite as $4x-18y=5$ and $-4x+hy=2$. For no solution, coefficients of $x$ and $y$ must be proportional: $$\frac{-4}{4}=\frac{h}{-18}.$$

steps.title: Solve for the parameter
steps.content: This gives $-1=\tfrac{h}{-18}$, so $h=18$. The constants differ, confirming no solution. That matches choice D — D is correct.
